scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf resources/public/assets/dist/js/* && rm -rf resources/public/assets/dist/css/*
scripts.build:copy: mkdir -p resources/public/assets/font/fa resources/public/assets/font/bootstrap resources/public/assets/fullcalendar-locale && cp node_modules/es5-shim/es5-shim.js resources/public/assets/dist/js/es5-shim.js && cp -r node_modules/font-awesome/fonts/. resources/public/assets/font/fa/ && cp -r node_modules/bootstrap/fonts/. resources/public/assets/font/bootstrap/ && cp -r node_modules/fullcalendar/dist/locale/. resources/public/assets/fullcalendar-locale/ && cp -r node_modules/jquery-ui/dist/themes/base/images/. resources/public/assets/dist/css/images/
scripts.build:css: cat resources/public/assets/dist/css/app.css node_modules/fullcalendar/dist/fullcalendar.css node_modules/jquery-ui/dist/themes/base/jquery-ui.css resources/private/assets/css/colorpicker.css resources/private/assets/css/freeow.css resources/private/assets/css/jquery.qtip.css resources/private/assets/css/jquery.timepicker.css | cleancss -o resources/public/assets/dist/css/agendav.css && cat node_modules/fullcalendar/dist/fullcalendar.print.css resources/private/assets/print-css/print.css | cleancss -o resources/public/assets/dist/css/agendav.print.css
scripts.prebuild:js: uglifyjs node_modules/moment/moment.js node_modules/moment-timezone/builds/moment-timezone-with-data.min.js node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.js node_modules/jquery-migrate/dist/jquery-migrate.js node_modules/bootstrap/js/button.js node_modules/bootstrap/js/tab.js node_modules/jquery-ui/dist/jquery-ui.js node_modules/fullcalendar/dist/fullcalendar.js node_modules/dustjs-linkedin/dist/dust-core.js node_modules/dustjs-helpers/dist/dust-helpers.js node_modules/rrule/dist/es5/rrule.js resources/private/assets/js/other/rrule-compat.js resources/private/assets/js/other/imagesloaded.pkg.min.js resources/private/assets/js/other/jquery.colorPicker.js resources/private/assets/js/other/jquery.freeow.min.js resources/private/assets/js/other/jquery.qtip.js resources/private/assets/js/other/jquery.serializeobject.js resources/private/assets/js/other/jquery.timepicker.js resources/private/assets/js/app/app.js resources/private/assets/js/app/datetime.js resources/private/assets/js/app/repeat-form.js resources/private/assets/templates/templates.js -b -o resources/public/assets/dist/js/agendav.js
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:templates && npm run build:copy && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build: npm run composer && npm run build:assets
scripts.dist: npm run composer && npm run build:assets && npm run dist-clean
